by consumers that need to detect \"has any sucker ever peered to chain X?\" — e.g. to prevent premature burn of bridgeable credit by `JBReferralSplitHook.burnUnbridgeableCreditFor`. Returns every key from `_suckersOf[projectId]` regardless of active/deprecated state. Order matches the underlying `EnumerableMap` iteration order (insertion order, with swap-and-pop semantics on removal — which this registry doesn't trigger, since deprecation transitions to `_SUCKER_DEPRECATED` rather than deleting).","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of every sucker ever registered for `projectId`."}},"allowSuckerDeployer(address)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployer":"The address of the deployer to add."}},"allowSuckerDeployers(address[])":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployers":"The addresses of the deployers to add."}},"constructor":{"params":{"directory":"The juicebox directory.","initialOwner":"The initial owner of this contract.","permissions":"A contract storing permissions.","prices":"The prices contract used to value remote per-context surplus/balance into a requested currency."}},"deploySuckersFor(uint256,bytes32,(address,bytes32,(address,uint32,bytes32)[])[])":{"params":{"configurations":"The sucker deployer configs to use to deploy the suckers.","projectId":"The ID of the project to deploy suckers for.","salt":"The salt used to deploy the contract. For the suckers to be peers, this must be the same value on each chain where suckers are deployed."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of the deployed suckers."}},"isSuckerOf(uint256,address)":{"params":{"addr":"The address of the sucker to check.","projectId":"The ID of the project to check for."},"returns":{"_0":"flag A flag indicating if the sucker belongs to the project, and was deployed through this registry."}},"isTrustedForwarder(address)":{"details":"Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"remoteBalanceOf(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Exposed as an external self-call boundary so `totalRemoteBalanceOf` can `try` it and drop a single sucker whose price feed is missing. A context whose currency already matches `currency` folds in at par (no feed read); a missing cross-currency feed reverts, and the aggregator catches it and skips just this sucker.","params":{"currency":"The currency to value into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The project whose price feeds to use.","sucker":"The sucker to read."},"returns":{"_0":"A `JBPeerChainValue` with the valued balance, the sucker's peer chain ID, and its snapshot freshness key."}},"remoteSurplusOf(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Exposed as an external self-call boundary so `totalRemoteSurplusOf` can `try` it and drop a single sucker whose price feed is missing. A context whose currency already matches `currency` folds in at par (no feed read); a missing cross-currency feed reverts, and the aggregator catches it and skips just this sucker.","params":{"currency":"The currency to value into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The project whose price feeds to use.","sucker":"The sucker to read."},"returns":{"_0":"A `JBPeerChainValue` with the valued surplus, the sucker's peer chain ID, and its snapshot freshness key."}},"remoteTotalSupplyOf(uint256)":{"details":"Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated snapshots dominate live routes. Silently skips suckers that revert.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"totalSupply":"The combined peer chain total supply."}},"removeDeprecatedSucker(uint256,address)":{"details":"The sucker retains mint permission (`isSuckerOf` still returns true) so pending claims can still be fulfilled. It is excluded from `suckersOf` and `suckerPairsOf`.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to remove the sucker from.","sucker":"The address of the deprecated sucker to remove."}},"removeSuckerDeployer(address)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployer":"The address of the deployer to remove."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setToRemoteFee(uint256)":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner. Fee cannot exceed MAX_TO_REMOTE_FEE.","params":{"fee":"The new fee amount in wei."}},"suckerPairsOf(uint256)":{"params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"pairs":"The pairs of suckers and their metadata."}},"suckersOf(uint256)":{"details":"Excludes suckers that have been deprecated and removed via `removeDeprecatedSucker`.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of the suckers."}},"totalRemoteBalanceOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Dedups same-peer suckers by freshest snapshot, then sums each sucker's balance valued into `currency`. Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated snapshots dominate live routes. A context whose currency already matches is taken at par (no feed); a missing cross-currency feed reverts and that sucker is silently skipped (conservative, bias-low).","params":{"currency":"The currency to value the combined balance into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"balance":"The combined peer chain balance."}},"totalRemoteSurplusOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Dedups same-peer suckers by freshest snapshot, then sums each sucker's surplus valued into `currency`. Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated snapshots dominate live routes. A context whose currency already matches is taken at par (no feed); a missing cross-currency feed reverts and that sucker is silently skipped (conservative, bias-low).","params":{"currency":"The currency to value the combined surplus into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"surplus":"The combined peer chain surplus."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"trustedForwarder()":{"details":"Returns the address of the trusted forwarder."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"DIRECTORY()":{"notice":"The Juicebox directory used to look up project terminals and controllers."},"MAX_TO_REMOTE_FEE()":{"notice":"The maximum ETH fee (in wei) that the owner can set via `setToRemoteFee()`."},"PERMISSIONS()":{"notice":"A contract storing permissions."},"PRICES()":{"notice":"The prices contract used to value remote per-context surplus and balance into a requested currency, exactly as the terminal store values local surplus."},"PROJECTS()":{"notice":"A contract which mints ERC-721s that represent project ownership and transfers."},"allSuckersOf(uint256)":{"notice":"All suckers for a project, INCLUDING deprecated entries that are no longer listed in `suckersOf`."},"allowSuckerDeployer(address)":{"notice":"Adds a suckers deployer to the allowlist."},"allowSuckerDeployers(address[])":{"notice":"Adds multiple sucker deployers to the allowlist."},"deploySuckersFor(uint256,bytes32,(address,bytes32,(address,uint32,bytes32)[])[])":{"notice":"Deploy one or more cross-chain suckers for a project in a single transaction. Each sucker is created via its deployer, registered in this registry, and immediately configured with its token mappings. Multiple suckers targeting the same peer chain are allowed for bridge resilience. The caller must have `DEPLOY_SUCKERS` permission, which also authorizes the initial token mappings in each deployment configuration."},"isSuckerOf(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Whether the given address is a sucker (active or deprecated) that was deployed through this registry for the specified project. Used by controllers to authorize mint calls from suckers."},"remoteBalanceOf(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Values one sucker's raw peer-chain balance into a currency, bundled with the peer chain ID and freshness."},"remoteSurplusOf(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Values one sucker's raw peer-chain surplus into a currency, bundled with the peer chain ID and freshness."},"remoteTotalSupplyOf(uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative total supply across all remote peer chains for a project."},"removeDeprecatedSucker(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Lets anyone mark a deprecated sucker as removed from active listings."},"removeSuckerDeployer(address)":{"notice":"Removes a sucker deployer from the allowlist."},"setToRemoteFee(uint256)":{"notice":"Set the ETH fee (in wei) paid into the fee project on each toRemote() call."},"suckerDeployerIsAllowed(address)":{"notice":"Tracks whether the specified sucker deployer is approved by this registry."},"suckerPairsOf(uint256)":{"notice":"All active (non-deprecated) suckers for a project, with their remote peer address and chain ID."},"suckersOf(uint256)":{"notice":"Gets all of the specified project's active suckers which were deployed through this registry."},"toRemoteFee()":{"notice":"The ETH fee (in wei) paid into the fee project via terminal.pay() on each toRemote() call."},"totalRemoteBalanceOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative peer-chain balance across all remote peer chains for a project, valued into a currency."},"totalRemoteSurplusOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative peer-chain surplus across all remote peer chains for a project, valued into a
